name: Chicken Breasts with Spicy Rub
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat chicken pieces dry.
2. Combine ingredients for rub.
3. Smear the rub over both sides of the chicken; the more you use, the spicier it will be.
4. Heat the barbecue and brush the grill with 2 tablespoons oil.
5. Place the chicken on the grill, skin side down.
6. Cook over medium heat, about 10 to 12 minutes per side, until the chicken is cooked through.
7. If the heat is too high, the coating may burn; if it's too low, cooking time will be slightly longer.
